ksa_text: Knowledge of DataOps principles and practices, including pipeline monitoring approaches, automated alerting, SLA management, incident response workflows, and operational metrics for measuring data pipeline health and reliability.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-K-006 (OP, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4281 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.428, dcwf=0.408, eu_ai_act=0.399) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: OP domain KSA OP-K-006 excluded at composite 0.4281, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4281 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4281 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a OP (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Bioinformatics Technician. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. OP KSA with composite 0.4281 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-K-006 (OP, composite 0.4281) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4281 with signal across nice=0.428, dcwf=0.408, eu_ai_act=0.399 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from OP-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4281, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
